controls.title: Foundation Models Layer
controls.description: Base model layer — covers model selection, provenance, fine-tuning security, and model integrity threats.

controls.title: Model provenance verification
controls.description: Verify source, training data lineage, and integrity of foundation models before deployment.

controls.title: Model integrity protection
controls.description: Protect model weights, parameters, and configuration from unauthorized modification.

controls.title: Fine-tuning security
controls.description: Secure fine-tuning pipelines against data poisoning and unauthorized modification.

controls.title: Data Operations Layer
controls.description: Data pipelines — covers RAG, vector stores, training data, embedding security, and data governance.

controls.title: RAG pipeline security
controls.description: Secure retrieval-augmented generation pipelines against injection, poisoning, and data leakage.

controls.title: Vector store protection
controls.description: Protect vector databases and embedding stores from unauthorized access and manipulation.

controls.title: Training data governance
controls.description: Govern training data lifecycle including sourcing, validation, labeling, and retention.

controls.title: Agent Frameworks Layer
controls.description: Agent runtime — covers agent orchestration, goal management, memory, and planning security.

controls.title: Agent goal integrity
controls.description: Protect agent goals and objectives from hijacking or unauthorized modification.

controls.title: Agent memory security
controls.description: Secure agent persistent and session memory against poisoning and unauthorized access.

controls.title: Planning and reasoning validation
controls.description: Validate agent planning and reasoning processes to detect manipulation or drift.

controls.title: Tools and Integration Layer
controls.description: Tool access — covers MCP, API integrations, plugin security, and tool authorization.

controls.title: Tool authorization and scoping
controls.description: Implement least-privilege tool access with explicit authorization for each tool action.

controls.title: MCP server security
controls.description: Secure Model Context Protocol servers against injection, spoofing, and unauthorized access.

controls.title: API integration security
controls.description: Secure API integrations with authentication, rate limiting, and input/output validation.

controls.title: Deployment Infrastructure Layer
controls.description: Infrastructure — covers containerization, networking, secrets management, and runtime isolation.

controls.title: Runtime isolation
controls.description: Isolate agent execution environments using containers, sandboxes, or VMs.

controls.title: Secrets and credential management
controls.description: Manage secrets, API keys, and credentials used by agents with rotation and least-privilege access.

controls.title: Network segmentation
controls.description: Segment networks to limit agent lateral movement and contain blast radius.

controls.title: Orchestration Layer
controls.description: Multi-agent coordination — covers inter-agent communication, delegation, consensus, and cascading failure prevention.

controls.title: Inter-agent authentication
controls.description: Authenticate agents in multi-agent systems to prevent spoofing and impersonation.

controls.title: Delegation controls
controls.description: Control and audit task delegation between agents with authority boundaries.

controls.title: Cascading failure prevention
controls.description: Implement circuit breakers and isolation patterns to prevent cascading failures across agents.

controls.title: Interaction and User Interface Layer
controls.description: Human-agent interface — covers user authentication, output validation, human oversight, and trust management.

controls.title: Output validation and filtering
controls.description: Validate and filter agent outputs before presenting to users or executing actions.

controls.title: Human oversight integration
controls.description: Integrate human-in-the-loop controls for high-risk decisions and actions.

controls.title: Trust calibration
controls.description: Help users calibrate trust in agent outputs with confidence indicators and provenance.

changelog.change: Initial seed — 7 layers with 21 sub-controls from CSA MAESTRO framework
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
